nl_query: What is the average number of sections per question paper?
failed_sql:
SELECT AVG(T2.section_count) AS avg_sections_per_paper
FROM   question_paper AS T1
JOIN   (
  SELECT qp_id, COUNT(*) AS section_count
  FROM   question_section
  GROUP BY qp_id
) AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.qp_id
